use_cases: Displaying success, error, or warning messages after form submissions
Communicating important status updates or notifications to users
Showing validation feedback or inline error messages
Alerting users to system messages or important information
Providing contextual help or informational notices within interfaces
ai_summary: A flexible alert/notification component with multiple semantic variants (brand, neutral, error, success, warning) for displaying contextual messages to users. Features customizable icon, title, description, and action slots. Uses color-coded backgrounds and borders to communicate message type and severity. Designed for integration within various UI contexts to provide real-time feedback and status communication.
